name: Caramel Walnut Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar and egg. Cut in half the margarine until crumbly. Stir in walnuts. Reserve 2 cups of the crumb mixture.
3. Press the remaining crumb mixture on the bottom of a greased 9 x 13 pan.
4. Bake for 15 minutes.
5. In a heavy saucepan, melt caramels with sweetened milk and the remaining 1/4 cup butter over low heat.
6. Pour the caramel mixture over the prepared crust.
7. Top with the reserved crumb mixture.
8. Bake for an additional 20 minutes or until bubbly. Cool, then cut into bars. Store loosely covered at room temperature.
